preamble.summary: Oracle against the Philistines. MT ch. 47, LXX ch. 29 (4th in LXX OAN order).
preamble.notable_variants: LXX shorter. Some geographic names differ in form.
preamble.structural_notes: MT ch. 47 = LXX ch. 29. Philistia is 2nd in MT OAN order, 4th in LXX.

variant_notes: LXX and MT are substantially identical here.
